prompt: Develop a HarborSuite Offline Hotel Commerce & PMS Operations system for full-service hotels that need on-property ordering, billing, and operational reporting without any internet dependency. The Vue.js web interface runs on front-desk workstations and in-room kiosks on the local network, supporting roles including Guest, Front Desk Agent, Service Staff, Finance Manager, Content Editor, and General Manager. Guests can browse hotel offerings (amenities, room service, late checkout, spa add-ons) with multi-spec selections (size, quantity, delivery window), see packaging and service fees (for example, a $2.50 packaging fee per food order plus an optional 18% service charge), add order notes capped at 250 characters, and submit checkout after a real-time price confirmation; if pricing or tax changes between cart and submit, the UI forces a re-confirm within 10 minutes before the order is accepted. Front Desk Agents manage folios with multiple charge items, post and reverse charges with a required reason, split or merge bills for shared rooms, and print invoices/receipts to local printers; payment methods are recorded as cash, card-present manual entry, gift certificate, or “direct bill,” with no online authorization. Content Editors publish property announcements, news, and carousel promos with an approval workflow and targeted release by organization, role, or tag (e.g., “VIP,” “Conference Group”), including version rollback and readership analytics. After service completion, Guests and Service Staff can rate each other 1–5 stars and file complaints within 7 days; the system tracks service-duration statistics, maintains a visible credit score (300–850, default 700) with violation records, and exports arbitration packets as locally generated PDF evidence bundles. The backend uses FastAPI to enforce validation, workflows, and auditability, with PostgreSQL persisting all transactions, content versions, and analytics snapshots on-premise. Order processing is state-machine driven with traceable transitions (created, confirmed, in-prep, delivered, canceled, refunded) and supports split/merge orders by supplier, warehouse, or SLA; exceptions trigger automatic rollback and a compensating entry on the folio. Night audit runs as a controlled day-close at a configurable time (default 3:00 AM), auto-posts room and tax, blocks closure if any folio is out of balance by more than $0.01, and produces reconciliation reports for charges, reversals, and payments. Data modeling and metadata governance are built in: core entities and dimension tables back dashboards for member scale/churn, event volume/participation, fund income-expense and budget execution, and approval efficiency, with a data dictionary, metric definitions, lineage, and dataset/version management so every report can be traced to its source query and data version. The Vue.js frontend communicates with FastAPI through REST-style APIs over the local network, using role-based access control, session timeouts after 15 minutes of inactivity, password rules (minimum 10 characters with complexity), lockout after 5 failed attempts for 15 minutes, and field-level masking for sensitive notes; exported files are generated locally and stored with checksums to detect tampering.
